results.evidence: README lines 4-8 clearly state user (teams and agents), problem (why something happened across sources), and differentiation (evidence-backed links vs keyword matches). Search vs Trace section (lines 12-26) and What Makes wtfoc Different (lines 87-103) reinforce.

What Works Today section (lines 106-114) explicitly scopes current capabilities. Line 114 directs vision to docs/vision.md. No encryption, distributed coordination, or other vision-only features are claimed as available.

Three concrete adoption paths preserved: Hosted MCP (lines 29-47), CLI (lines 49-63), Self-Host (lines 65-85). Plus local MCP server (lines 122-135). Links to why.md, vision.md, pipeline-architecture.md, foc-rag-storage.md, demos, user-stories.md, SPEC.md, DEVELOPMENT.md all verified as existing files.
